scale_pos_weight: neg/pos on the training split, i.e. (y_train==0).sum()/max((y_train==1).sum(),1)
rich_features: thin_features + originator/counterparty training-window aggregates (out/in degree, volume, mean/max/min amount, distinct counterparties, distinct currencies, currency-mismatch rate); computed on the training window only
note_size_not_a_feature: entity size / legal form is an EVALUATION grouping only and is never a model feature in either the thin or the rich detector.
note_defaults: min_child_weight and reg_lambda are not set in the training call; the values above are the XGBoost defaults that were therefore in force.
note_split: temporal day-based split reproducing the reference repo ratios (~0.6/0.2/0.2); early stopping monitors validation aucpr.
note_early_stopping_stage: early_stopping_rounds is 40 for HI-Small; the HI-Medium stage uses the identical configuration with early_stopping_rounds=30.
note_robustness: results/amlworld_xgb_hp_robustness.csv is a perturbation sweep in a reduced harness; its baseline metrics do not correspond to the main-paper detectors and must not be cited as the main configuration.
